subcodes.title: Words to Aline Shane-Devin spoken on 1907-10-14
subcodes.first_line: Yes. As in the vegetable world the best results are obtained when one kind of fruit is grafted on another, so in the human family, the best and strongest children are obtained by intermarriage between different races.
subcodes.subjects: @race unity; racial issues, @marriage as means of spiritual progress, @unity in diversity
